mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SNS_POST (FAMILY_ID, CONTENT, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_DT) VALUES (#{familyId}, #{content}, #{regId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SNS_POST WHERE FAMILY_ID=#{familyId} AND POST_SEQ=#{postSeq}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SNS_POST WHERE FAMILY_ID=#{familyId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SNS_POST WHERE FAMILY_ID=#{familyId} AND POST_SEQ=#{postSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SNS_POST_IMG (POST_SEQ, FAMILY_ID, FILE_NM, STORED_NM, SORT_ORDER, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{postSeq}, #{familyId}, #{fileNm}, #{storedNm}, #{sortOrder}, #{regId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SNS_POST_IMG WHERE POST_SEQ=#{postSeq} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER
SELECT * FROM SNS_POST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY REG_DT DESC LIMIT 20
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SNS_POST_COMMENT (POST_SEQ, FAMILY_ID, CONTENT, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_DT) VALUES (#{postSeq}, #{familyId}, #{content}, #{regId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SNS_POST_COMMENT WHERE COMMENT_SEQ = #{commentSeq} AND FAMILY_ID = #{familyId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SNS_POST_COMMENT WHERE COMMENT_SEQ = #{commentSeq} AND FAMILY_ID = #{familyId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SNS_POST_COMMENT WHERE POST_SEQ = #{postSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO SNS_POST_LIKE (POST_SEQ, FAMILY_ID, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{postSeq}, #{familyId}, #{regId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SNS_POST_LIKE WHERE POST_SEQ = #{postSeq} AND FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND REG_ID = #{regId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SNS_POST_LIKE WHERE POST_SEQ = #{postSeq}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SNS_POST_LIKE WHERE POST_SEQ = #{postSeq} AND FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND REG_ID = #{regId}
